TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == dadiw nu Sakizaya- heiyan huiyan == u Sakizaya a dadiw-" heiyan huiyan" sawsawni matengil i lalikit nu Sakizaya. uyniyan a dadiw sa, sapasalisin nu "Takubuwan Lais" mapatayay a kakawsan, sisa mudadiw i Palamal amitala tu Lamal-Dietu atu tuas tayni. miawaw atu militemuh tu Dietu atu tuas tayni mukan tu sapaini nu mita. pulung musalisinay a binawlan mudadiw. malikat ku lamal-culay nu Dietu-dungy. muazih tu tatengaay belih nu Hulam a kumu
S.PHON: == dadiw nu sakizaja- ńß…ôijan ńßuijan == u sakizaja a dadiw-" ńß…ôijan ńßuijan" sawsawni mat…ôŇčir~…ĺ i r~…ĺar~…ĺikit nu sakizaja. ujnijan a dadiw sa, sapasar~…ĺisin nu "takubuwan r~…ĺais" mapatajaj a kakawsan, sisa mudadiw i par~…ĺamar~…ĺ amitar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ-di…ôtu atu tuas tajni. miawaw atu mir~…ĺit…ômuńß tu di…ôtu atu tuas tajni mukan tu sapaini nu mita. pur~…ĺuŇč musar~…ĺisinaj a binawr~…ĺan mudadiw. mar~…ĺikat ku r~…ĺamar~…ĺ- ¶ur~…ĺaj nu di…ôtu-duŇčj. muazińß tu tat…ôŇčaaj b…ôr~…ĺińß nu ńßur~…ĺam a kumu
S.FORM: == dadiw nu Sakizaya- heiyan huiyan == u Sakizaya a dadiw-" heiyan huiyan" sawsawni matengil i lalikit nu Sakizaya. uyniyan a dadiw sa, sapasalisin nu "Takubuwan Lais" mapatayay a kakawsan, sisa mudadiw i Palamal amitala tu Lamal-Dietu atu tuas tayni. miawaw atu militemuh tu Dietu atu tuas tayni mukan tu sapaini nu mita. pulung musalisinay a binawlan mudadiw. malikat ku lamal-culay nu Dietu-dungy. muazih tu tatengaay belih nu Hulam a kumu
S.PHON: == dadiw nu sakizaja- ńß…ôijan ńßuijan == u sakizaja a dadiw-" ńß…ôijan ńßuijan" sawsawni mat…ôŇčir~…ĺ i r~…ĺar~…ĺikit nu sakizaja. ujnijan a dadiw sa, sapasar~…ĺisin nu "takubuwan r~…ĺais" mapatajaj a kakawsan, sisa mudadiw i par~…ĺamar~…ĺ amitar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ-di…ôtu atu tuas tajni. miawaw atu mir~…ĺit…ômuńß tu di…ôtu atu tuas tajni mukan tu sapaini nu mita. pur~…ĺuŇč musar~…ĺisinaj a binawr~…ĺan mudadiw. mar~…ĺikat ku r~…ĺamar~…ĺ- ¶ur~…ĺaj nu di…ôtu-duŇčj. muazińß tu tat…ôŇčaaj b…ôr~…ĺińß nu ńßur~…ĺam a kumu
